item.title: Debugger: Refine PaneAllocs
item.body: This PR renames PaneMemory to PanAllocs, and refines it by * making the pane content more structural as a table with common properties (base_addr, size, align, if provenance is exposed or not ...) for each allocation * dimming deallocated allocations * referencing the names of locals and globals (e.g. functions and statics)

repo.name: miri
repo.description: [A forked miri for OS] An interpreter for Rust's mid-level intermediate representation

commit.message:
debugger: refactor memory pane to a table of allocations

┌Locals───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│Local Name       Type                          Value                                             │
│_0               isize                         uninit                                            │
│_1    main       fn() -> T                     Indirect(MemPlace { ptr: 0xfffff8[alloc19]<17>, me│
│_2    argc       isize                         1                                                 │
│_3    argv       *const *const u8              ptr(0x10020)                                      │
│_4    sigpipe    u8                            0                                                 │
│_5               &dyn std::ops::Fn() -> i32 +  ScalarPair(0xfffff0[alloc20]<21>, 0x10110[alloc21]│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌Allocations──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│   AllocID       BaseAddr    Alive         Kind      Size      Align  ProvExposed          Locals│
│        19       0xfffff8     true        Stack       8 B        8 B        false            main│
│        20       0xfffff0     true        Stack       8 B        8 B        false     _5,_6,_7,_8│
│                                                                                                 │
debugger: skip allocations that lack further info
debugger: mark fields in AllocInfo as Option, and don't display if None
debugger: display fn ptrs and statics in allocs pane

debugger: list locals' allocations that are not in alloc_map

┌Locals────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│Local Name        Type                              Value                                                     │
│_0                isize                             uninit                                                    │
│_1    argc        isize                             Indirect(MemPlace { ptr: 0xfffff8[alloc88]<8>, meta: None,│
│_2    _argv       *const *const u8                  ptr(0x10018)                                              │
│_3    miri_start_ fn(isize, *const *const u8) -> is ptr(0x10063)                                              │
│_4                fn(isize, *const *const u8) -> is -                                                         │
│_5                ()                                uninit                                                    │
│_6                core::fmt::Arguments<'_>          uninit                                                    │
│_7    args        (&isize, &fn(isize, *const *const uninit                                                    │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌Allocations (total=3, alive=3)────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  AllocID      BaseAddr   Dealloc        Kind      Size    Align ProvExposed         Global             Locals│
│       83       0x10018               Machine       8 B      8 B                                         _argv│
│       87       0x10063                Global       0 B      1 B                 miri_start      miri_start_fn│
│       88      0xfffff8                 Stack       8 B      8 B                                       argc,_8│
